Services Industries Use Cases Insights About Contact Us

Technology Consulting

Clarity for technical decisions in Swiss industrial companies and SMEs.

Making Technology Decisions with Structure

Technology decisions are rarely purely technical. They influence strategy, risks, resources, supply chains, and an organization’s ability to develop and industrialize reliably. VAIRA helps companies evaluate technologies clearly, identify risks early, and make decisions with structure and confidence.

Our approach combines technical depth with systemic clarity — for organizations that want to assess technological opportunities realistically and move into execution with confidence.

What We Do in Technology Consulting

Technology Strategy

We create clarity on which technologies matter, what risks they carry, and how they integrate into existing systems.

Tech Scouting

Structured identification, evaluation, and prioritization of new technologies — with a focus on industrial applications and technical feasibility.

Feasibility Assessments

Technical and organizational evaluation of concepts, prototypes, and development approaches.

Decision Architecture

We develop clear decision frameworks that connect technical, economic, and organizational factors — repeatable, transparent, and low‑risk.

Who This Is For

  • Industrial companies evaluating technological opportunities
  • SMEs seeking clarity and confidence in technical decisions
  • R&D and engineering teams needing structure and alignment
  • Organizations aiming to industrialize technologies faster and more reliably

Why VAIRA

VAIRA combines technical depth, industrial experience, and systemic clarity. Our approach is calm, analytical, and structured — without hype or unnecessary complexity. We help teams make technical decisions with confidence and move projects forward with clarity.
